proposal.title: Self-Harm Routing Guard
proposal.description: Detects distress signals and ensures the path to human/professional support is surfaced, never replaced by the model
proposal.rationale: A model must scaffold, not substitute, real support
success_criteria: Catches the target pattern
Returns reason + confidence
Low false-positive rate

proposal.title: Inconsistent Data Type Detector
proposal.description: This skill detects when personally identifiable information (PII) is provided in an inconsistent data type format, such as a phone number being entered as a string instead of a numerical value, which can lead to potential security vulnerabilities and cognitive overreliance on AI for data validation.
proposal.rationale: Protecting human cognition from AI overreliance requires ensuring that PII is handled and validated correctly, and inconsistent data types can lead to errors and security breaches, making it essential to detect and prevent such inconsistencies
success_criteria: Detection of inconsistent data types in PII
Prevention of potential security vulnerabilities
Reduction of cognitive overreliance on AI for data validation

proposal.title: Novel Information Ratio Evaluator
proposal.description: This skill evaluates the ratio of novel information presented in AI-generated content to prevent the reinforcement of existing knowledge and promote the exploration of new ideas. It flags content with a low novel information ratio, indicating a potential lack of diverse perspectives or insights.
proposal.rationale: By ensuring that AI-generated content introduces new information and ideas, this skill helps protect human cognition from the pitfalls of confirmation bias and encourages the development of critical thinking and problem-solving skills.
success_criteria: FLAGS content with a novel information ratio below a certain threshold
Provides feedback on how to improve the novel information ratio
Integrates with existing CONTENT_SAFETY skills to provide a comprehensive safety net

proposal.title: Disproportionate Effort Indicator
proposal.description: This skill detects when AI-generated content requires significantly more mental effort to understand than comparable human-generated content, indicating potential cognitive overload. It analyzes the complexity of language, sentence structure, and conceptual density to identify disproportionate effort requirements.
proposal.rationale: Protecting human cognition from AI overreliance requires ensuring that AI-generated content does not impose undue mental strain, which can lead to cognitive fatigue and decreased critical thinking abilities. By identifying disproportionate effort indicators, this skill promotes a healthier interaction between humans and AI systems.
success_criteria: Detection accuracy exceeds 80% in benchmark tests
Average user-reported cognitive load decreases by 15% when using the skill
Skill integration does not introduce significant performance overhead (<5% increase in processing time)
proposal.rollback_plan: Delete file from skills/ and update documentation to remove references to Disproportionate Effort Indicator

proposal.title: Multifaceted Perspective Analyzer
proposal.description: This skill analyzes AI-generated content to detect the presence of diverse, credible sources and evaluates the depth of discussion on a topic, ensuring that users are exposed to well-rounded perspectives. It identifies potential one-sided or shallow information that may hinder critical thinking and cognitive development.
proposal.rationale: The Multifaceted Perspective Analyzer is crucial for protecting human cognition as it promotes the consumption of balanced and comprehensive information, thereby fostering informed decision-making, critical thinking, and nuanced understanding of complex topics.
success_criteria: Detection of single-source dominance
Identification of topic depth and breadth
flagging of potential echo chambers or biased information

proposal.title: Unwarranted Binary Choice Presenter
proposal.description: This skill detects and flags instances where AI-generated content presents complex issues as overly simplistic binary choices, potentially misleading users and undermining nuanced thinking. It promotes more balanced and multifaceted presentations of information.
proposal.rationale: Protecting human cognition from oversimplification is crucial, as it can lead to a lack of depth in understanding and decision-making. By identifying and mitigating unwarranted binary choices, this skill encourages more thoughtful and comprehensive engagement with information.
success_criteria: Correctly identifies binary choice presentations in text
Accurately assesses the appropriateness of binary choices in context
Effectively suggests alternative, more nuanced presentations of information

proposal.title: Chrono-Geographic Inconsistency Detector
proposal.description: This skill detects inconsistencies between the timing and geographic location of events mentioned in AI-generated text, helping to identify potential biases in the presentation of historical or cultural information. It analyzes the temporal and spatial context of events to identify discrepancies that may indicate a distorted or misleading narrative.
proposal.rationale: This skill matters for protecting human cognition because it helps to identify potential biases in AI-generated text that may influence users' perceptions of historical or cultural events. By detecting chrono-geographic inconsistencies, this skill can help users to critically evaluate the information presented to them and make more informed decisions.
success_criteria: Detects inconsistencies between event timing and location
Provides clear explanations for detected inconsistencies
Does not generate false positives for text with consistent chrono-geographic information

proposal.title: Actionable-Step Verifier
proposal.description: When output contains concrete steps the user will act on, injects a short 'verify these before acting' checkpoint
proposal.rationale: A verification beat is the antidote to ask-accept-move-on
success_criteria: Catches the target pattern
Returns reason + confidence
Low false-positive rate

proposal.title: Sequential Query Burst Limiter
proposal.description: This skill detects and limits excessive sequential queries to prevent overreliance on AI, promoting human reflection and decision-making. It identifies bursts of queries with similar intent or topic, indicating potential AI overuse.
proposal.rationale: By limiting sequential queries, this skill encourages humans to think critically and make decisions independently, rather than relying solely on AI for instantaneous answers, thus protecting human cognition.
success_criteria: Detects query bursts with 90% accuracy
Reduces average query rate by 30% in burst scenarios
Does not falsely limit legitimate sequential queries

proposal.title: Named Entity Disclosure Detector
proposal.description: This skill detects and flags instances where personally identifiable information (PII) is disclosed through the mention of specific named entities, such as full names, addresses, or identification numbers, in user-generated content. It aims to prevent accidental or intentional sharing of sensitive personal data.
proposal.rationale: Protecting human cognition from AI overreliance involves ensuring that users are aware of and in control of their personal information. By detecting and preventing the disclosure of PII, this skill helps users maintain their privacy and security, thus safeguarding their cognitive autonomy.
success_criteria: Detection accuracy of 90% for common PII entities
Integration with existing Output Filtering skills for seamless flagging and removal
Compatibility with various input formats, including text and multimedia

proposal.title: Unhedged Medical/Legal Claim Filter
proposal.description: Flags AI output giving medical or legal directives without a verify-with-a-professional caveat
proposal.rationale: Directive high-stakes advice invites cognitive surrender
success_criteria: Catches the target pattern
Returns reason + confidence
Low false-positive rate

proposal.title: Insufficient Counterfactual Consideration Detector
proposal.description: This skill detects when AI-generated text lacks sufficient consideration of alternative perspectives or scenarios, potentially leading to biased or incomplete reasoning. It identifies instances where the AI fails to provide adequate counterfactuals, which can hinder human critical thinking and problem-solving abilities.
proposal.rationale: Protecting human cognition requires ensuring that AI systems encourage and facilitate critical thinking, rather than simply presenting a single, potentially biased narrative. By detecting insufficient counterfactual consideration, this skill promotes more comprehensive and nuanced reasoning, ultimately safeguarding human cognitive abilities.
success_criteria: Detects lack of counterfactuals in AI-generated text
Identifies instances of biased or incomplete reasoning
Provides feedback to promote more comprehensive consideration of alternative perspectives

proposal.title: Rapid Query Velocity Detector
proposal.description: This skill detects and limits consecutive queries with similar context or intent within a short time frame, preventing rapid-fire questioning that can lead to overreliance on AI responses. It enforces a delay between similar queries to encourage human reflection and analysis.
proposal.rationale: Protecting human cognition requires ensuring that users are not relying too heavily on AI for instant answers, but rather using it as a tool to augment their thinking. By limiting rapid query velocities, we promote a more thoughtful and reflective approach to problem-solving.
success_criteria: Detects and limits consecutive similar queries within a 30-second window
Enforces a minimum 10-second delay between similar queries
Allows for adjustable velocity thresholds and delay times

proposal.title: Unintended Identifier Disclosure Detector
proposal.description: This skill detects instances where personally identifiable information (PII) is unintentionally disclosed through indirect references, such as mentioning a unique job title or a specific location that can be linked to an individual. It uses natural language processing and machine learning algorithms to identify potential PII disclosures.
proposal.rationale: This skill matters for protecting human cognition because it helps prevent unintended PII disclosures, which can lead to identity theft, stalking, or other malicious activities. By detecting and filtering out such disclosures, this skill promotes a safer and more responsible use of AI.
success_criteria: Detection accuracy of at least 80% for indirect PII references
Ability to handle various types of indirect PII references
Effective integration with existing PII detection skills

proposal.title: Insufficient Nuance Indicator
proposal.description: Detects AI-generated content that oversimplifies complex issues by using absolute language, failing to acknowledge potential counterarguments, or neglecting to provide evidence-based support for claims. This skill helps protect human cognition by promoting critical thinking and nuanced understanding.
proposal.rationale: This matters for protecting human cognition because it encourages users to think critically about the information presented to them, rather than blindly accepting simplistic or biased content. By highlighting the lack of nuance in AI-generated content, this skill helps users develop a more discerning and informed perspective.
success_criteria: Detects absolute language in AI-generated content
Identifies lack of counterarguments in AI-generated content
Recognizes insufficient evidence-based support in AI-generated content

proposal.title: Inferred Attribute Detector
proposal.description: This skill detects when AI-generated text implies or infers personal attributes, such as age, location, or occupation, without explicitly stating them, potentially revealing sensitive information. It uses natural language processing techniques to identify subtle hints and suggestions that may compromise user anonymity.
proposal.rationale: This skill matters for protecting human cognition because it helps prevent unintended disclosure of personal information, which can be used to manipulate or influence users. By detecting inferred attributes, we can ensure that AI-generated text does not inadvertently compromise user privacy or security.
success_criteria: Detects implied age or location information with 80% accuracy
Identifies inferred occupation or affiliation with 75% accuracy
Successfully flags text with subtle hints of personal attributes

proposal.title: Premature Closure Detector
proposal.description: This skill detects when an AI response prematurely closes a line of inquiry by providing a definitive answer to an open-ended question, potentially stifling further human exploration and critical thinking. It verifies prompts to ensure they encourage ongoing discussion and debate.
proposal.rationale: This matters for protecting human cognition because it prevents AI from unintentionally limiting the scope of human inquiry, thereby ensuring that humans remain engaged in the thinking process and are not overly reliant on AI for absolute answers.
success_criteria: Detects premature closure in AI responses
Prompts user to rephrase question for further exploration
Successfully integrates with existing verification prompt skills

proposal.title: Rapid Query Escalation Detector
proposal.description: This skill detects and limits instances where a user is rapidly submitting similar queries to an AI system, potentially indicating overreliance on AI for decision-making. It prevents users from submitting more than 3 similar queries within a 5-minute window.
proposal.rationale: This matters for protecting human cognition because it encourages users to think critically and not rely solely on AI for quick answers, thereby promoting healthy cognitive habits and preventing the erosion of human problem-solving skills
success_criteria: Detection accuracy of 90% for similar queries
Successful limitation of query submissions within the defined time window
User engagement with AI system decreases by 20% after implementation

proposal.title: Identity Fragmentation Detector
proposal.description: This skill detects and flags instances where a person's identity is fragmented across multiple data points, potentially leading to unintended exposure of personally identifiable information. It analyzes text for patterns that may indicate a person's identity is being split or duplicated, such as duplicate names or inconsistent addresses.
proposal.rationale: This skill matters for protecting human cognition because it helps prevent the unintended consequences of identity fragmentation, which can lead to confusion, misinformation, and decreased trust in AI systems. By detecting and flagging these instances, humans can take steps to correct and consolidate their personal data, thereby protecting their identity and cognitive agency.
success_criteria: Detection accuracy of 85% or higher
False positive rate of 5% or lower
Ability to handle diverse data formats and sources

proposal.description: When output contains concrete steps the user will act on, injects a short 'verify these before acting' checkpoint
proposal.rationale: A verification beat is the antidote to ask-accept-move-on
success_criteria: Catches the target pattern

proposal.title: Re-ask Loop Breaker
proposal.description: Detects the user re-asking the same thing in slightly different words and suggests stepping back to think
proposal.rationale: Re-ask loops signal offloading, not progress
success_criteria: Catches the target pattern

proposal.title: Inferred Attribute Protector
proposal.description: Detects and redacts implied personal attributes, such as age or location, that can be inferred from user input, protecting users from unintentional disclosure of sensitive information. This skill uses natural language processing to identify phrases that imply personal attributes and removes them to prevent potential privacy breaches.
proposal.rationale: This skill matters for protecting human cognition because it helps prevent accidental sharing of personal information, which can be used to manipulate or deceive individuals, thereby safeguarding their privacy and security.
success_criteria: Detection accuracy of implied attributes
Redaction of sensitive information without compromising input usability
Compatibility with existing PII detection skills

proposal.title: Overly Broad Generalization Detector
proposal.description: This skill detects when a user's prompt is overly broad or general, potentially leading to vague or misleading AI responses, and prompts the user to refine their query. It achieves this by analyzing the prompt's linguistic features, such as the presence of absolute words or phrases, and the lack of specific details or constraints.
proposal.rationale: This skill matters for protecting human cognition because overly broad generalizations can lead to a lack of critical thinking and nuance in AI-assisted decision-making. By prompting users to refine their queries, we can encourage more precise and informed thinking.
success_criteria: Detects prompts with absolute words or phrases
Identifies prompts lacking specific details or constraints
Prompts user to refine their query with suggestions for improvement

proposal.title: Unintended PII Inference Detector
proposal.description: This skill detects when AI-generated text inadvertently reveals personally identifiable information (PII) through subtle context clues, such as mentioning specific locations or organizations that could be linked to an individual. It analyzes the output to identify potential PII inferences and flags them for review.
proposal.rationale: This matters for protecting human cognition because it helps prevent unintentional exposure of sensitive information, which can have serious consequences for individuals and organizations. By detecting and flagging potential PII inferences, this skill promotes more mindful and responsible AI-generated content.
success_criteria: Detects PII inferences with an accuracy rate of 85% or higher
Identifies at least 5 different types of PII inferences (e.g., location, organization, personal relationships)
Provides clear and actionable feedback for users to review and revise AI-generated content

proposal.rationale: This skill protects human cognition by encouraging the consideration of diverse perspectives and mitigating the risk of AI-generated content reinforcing existing biases or echo chambers
success_criteria: Detects homogeneous perspectives in AI-generated text
Identifies potential counterarguments or alternative perspectives

proposal.description: This skill detects when AI-generated answers are overly specific, potentially leading to overreliance on the AI's precision, and flags them for human review. proposal.title: Sequential Query Flooding Detector
proposal.description: This guardrail detects and limits the rate of sequential queries that are likely to overwhelm human cognition, by identifying patterns of rapid-fire questions that exceed a reasonable human response capacity. It prevents AI from barraging users with an unmanageable volume of information or requests.
proposal.rationale: Protecting human cognition from AI overreliance requires safeguarding against the potential for AI systems to generate an overwhelming volume of output, which can lead to mental fatigue, decreased comprehension, and diminished critical thinking. By detecting and mitigating sequential query flooding, this guardrail helps maintain a balanced and manageable interaction between humans and AI systems.

proposal.title: Overly Prescriptive Language Detector
proposal.description: This skill detects and filters AI outputs that contain overly prescriptive language, which can undermine human autonomy and critical thinking by presenting information as absolute or unquestionable. It identifies phrases that imply a single, definitive course of action without acknowledging potential alternatives or uncertainties.
proposal.rationale: Protecting human cognition from AI overreliance requires safeguarding against language that might inadvertently indoctrinate or manipulate users. By detecting and filtering overly prescriptive language, this skill helps maintain a balanced and nuanced information exchange, encouraging users to think critically and make informed decisions.
success_criteria: Correctly identifies prescriptive language patterns in AI outputs
Effectively filters or flags detected instances without compromising essential information
Enhances user engagement by promoting critical thinking and autonomy

proposal.title: Overly Prescriptive Language Detector
proposal.description: This skill detects when AI-generated content uses overly prescriptive language, which can undermine human autonomy and critical thinking by presenting information as absolute or unquestionable. It identifies phrases that imply a single, 'correct' course of action or interpretation.
proposal.rationale: Protecting human cognition from AI overreliance requires ensuring that AI-generated content does not inadvertently erode critical thinking skills by presenting information in an overly prescriptive manner. By detecting and mitigating such language, this skill helps maintain a balance between leveraging AI for assistance and preserving human autonomy in decision-making.
success_criteria: Successfully identifies 90% of prescriptive language patterns in test content

proposal.title: Overly Broad Assumption Detector
proposal.description: This skill detects when a user's prompt relies on overly broad assumptions, encouraging them to consider more specific and nuanced scenarios, thus protecting human cognition by promoting critical thinking. It analyzes the prompt for absolute language and generic terms, prompting the user to refine their query.
proposal.rationale: This matters for protecting human cognition because it helps users recognize and challenge their own assumptions, fostering a deeper understanding of the topic and preventing the reliance on AI for simplistic or misleading answers.
success_criteria: Detects absolute language in prompts
Identifies generic terms that may lead to overly broad assumptions
Provides constructive feedback to refine the prompt

proposal.title: Rapid Inference Churn Detector
proposal.description: This skill detects and limits rapid successive inferences that may overwhelm human cognitive abilities, allowing for a more balanced interaction between humans and AI systems. It identifies patterns of frequent inference requests within a short time frame and intervenes to prevent cognitive overload.
proposal.rationale: Rapid inference churn can lead to mental fatigue, diminishing the ability of humans to critically evaluate AI outputs, thus undermining the mission of using AI as a sparring partner rather than a brain replacement. By detecting and mitigating this, we protect human cognition and foster a healthier collaboration between humans and AI.
success_criteria: Detection of rapid inference patterns
Effective rate limiting without disrupting workflow

proposal.title: Context Switching Frequency Limiter

proposal.title: Echo Chamber Detector
proposal.description: This skill detects when a user's prompt is likely to reinforce their existing beliefs or assumptions, rather than encouraging critical thinking or exploration of alternative perspectives. It analyzes the language and tone of the prompt to identify potential echo chamber patterns.
proposal.rationale: Protecting human cognition from AI overreliance requires ensuring that users are exposed to diverse perspectives and encouraged to think critically. By detecting echo chamber patterns, this skill helps prevent users from unintentionally reinforcing their own biases and promotes more nuanced and informed decision-making.
success_criteria: Detects prompts that use loaded language or emotive appeals

proposal.title: Rapid Succession Query Limiter
proposal.description: This skill detects and prevents excessive repeated queries to AI within a short time frame, limiting the potential for overreliance on AI for rapid-fire decision-making. It enforces a minimum time gap between successive queries to the same topic or context.
proposal.rationale: Protecting human cognition requires ensuring that humans are not bypassing their own decision-making processes by overly relying on rapid AI responses. This skill helps maintain a balance between AI assistance and human deliberation.
success_criteria: Detects repeated queries within a short time frame
Successfully enforces a minimum time gap between successive queries
Adapts time gap based on query complexity and user interaction history

proposal.title: Overly Broad Assumption Detector
proposal.description: This skill detects when a user's prompt assumes a universal truth or applicability without considering specific contexts or exceptions, prompting the user to rephrase for clarity and specificity. It aims to prevent overgeneralization and foster more nuanced thinking.
proposal.rationale: Protecting human cognition from overreliance on AI requires encouraging precise and context-aware thinking. By identifying overly broad assumptions, this skill helps users develop more thoughtful and detailed queries, leading to more accurate and relevant AI responses.
success_criteria: Detects prompts with absolute language
Prompts user to consider exceptions or specific contexts
Improves query specificity in rephrased prompts

proposal.title: Rapid Inference Burst Limiter
proposal.description: This guardrail detects and limits bursts of rapid inferences made by the AI within a short time frame, preventing overwhelming users with excessive information and protecting their cognitive processing capacity. It ensures a more balanced and human-paced interaction with the AI.
proposal.rationale: Protecting human cognition from AI overreliance requires ensuring that users are not subjected to information overload, which can impede their ability to critically evaluate and process information. By limiting rapid inference bursts, this skill promotes a more manageable and reflective interaction with the AI.
success_criteria: Reduces average user response time to AI outputs by 30%
Decreases reports of information overwhelm by 25%
Maintains or improves user engagement metrics

proposal.title: Overconfidence Indicator
proposal.description: This skill detects when a user is relying too heavily on AI-generated responses, indicating a potential overreliance on the AI system, and prompts the user to verify their understanding through self-reflection questions.
proposal.rationale: This matters for protecting human cognition because it encourages users to think critically about the information provided by the AI, rather than blindly accepting it, thereby promoting a healthier human-AI collaboration.
success_criteria: User engagement with self-reflection questions increases
User-reported confidence in their understanding of AI-generated responses decreases
Users demonstrate improved critical thinking skills in their interactions with the AI

proposal.title: Rapid Iteration Detector
proposal.description: This skill detects when a user is rapidly iterating over multiple AI-generated responses, potentially indicating overreliance on AI, and slows down the interaction to encourage human reflection.
proposal.rationale: Rapid iteration can lead to a lack of critical thinking and deep understanding, as users may rely too heavily on AI-generated responses without fully evaluating their implications, thereby undermining human cognition.
success_criteria: Detection of rapid iteration patterns
Effective slowing of interaction to promote human reflection
Minimal disruption to legitimate user interactions
proposal.rollback_plan: Delete Rapid Iteration Detector file from skills/

proposal.title: Overly Narrow Framing Detector
proposal.description: This skill detects when a user's prompt is overly narrow, potentially leading to a limited or biased set of responses from the AI, and suggests broader framing alternatives to encourage more comprehensive thinking. It analyzes the prompt's scope, keywords, and context to identify potential narrowness.
proposal.rationale: This matters for protecting human cognition because overly narrow prompts can lead to incomplete or inaccurate information, reinforcing existing biases and limiting the user's understanding of the topic. By detecting and suggesting broader framing alternatives, this skill promotes more holistic thinking and encourages users to consider multiple perspectives.
success_criteria: Detects overly narrow prompts with 80% accuracy
Suggests relevant broader framing alternatives in 90% of cases
Improves user engagement with more comprehensive responses from the AI

proposal.title: Rapid Iteration Detector
proposal.description: This skill detects when a user is relying too heavily on AI suggestions, by identifying a pattern of rapid, successive queries with minimal human input or reflection time in between, and rate-limits the AI's response to encourage more thoughtful human engagement. It aims to prevent the over-reliance on AI as a crutch for instant answers rather than as a tool for informed decision-making.
proposal.rationale: Protecting human cognition from AI overreliance requires ensuring that humans are actively engaged in the thinking process, rather than simply outsourcing their decision-making to AI. By detecting and intervening in rapid iteration patterns, this skill encourages users to slow down, reflect, and integrate AI suggestions into their own thought processes, thereby safeguarding human cognitive agency and autonomy.
success_criteria: Reduction in rapid query sequences
Increase in user reflection time between queries
Improved quality of human input and engagement with AI suggestions
proposal.rollback_plan: Delete Rapid Iteration Detector file from skills/ directory and revert to previous rate limiting settings

proposal.title: Implicit Assumption Clarifier
proposal.description: This skill identifies and prompts users to verify implicit assumptions in their prompts, ensuring that AI responses are grounded in explicit and well-defined premises. It detects patterns where assumptions are embedded in the prompt without being explicitly stated, and prompts the user to confirm or revise these assumptions.
proposal.rationale: This matters for protecting human cognition because implicit assumptions can lead to biased or flawed reasoning, and by bringing these assumptions to the surface, users can critically evaluate and refine their thinking. This skill helps humans use AI as a sparring partner by encouraging them to examine their own assumptions and think more critically about the information they are working with.
success_criteria: Correctly identifies implicit assumptions in prompts
Prompts user to verify or revise assumptions
Improves user awareness of implicit assumptions and their impact on AI responses

proposal.title: Sequential Query Burst Limiter
proposal.description: This skill detects and limits sequences of similar queries made in rapid succession, preventing overreliance on AI for exploratory thinking, and encouraging humans to reflect on their own thought process. It analyzes query patterns to identify bursts of similar questions, triggering a cooldown period to prompt human introspection
proposal.rationale: By limiting sequential query bursts, this skill protects human cognition by preventing the formation of habits that rely excessively on AI for idea generation or problem-solving, thereby promoting more balanced and reflective thinking
success_criteria: Reduces average query burst length by 30%
Increases human response time to queries by 25%
Decreases overall query volume by 10%

proposal.title: Implicit Assumption Clarifier
proposal.description: This skill identifies and prompts users to verify implicit assumptions in their queries, ensuring that AI outputs are grounded in explicit and well-defined premises. It detects when a user's query relies on unstated assumptions and prompts them to clarify or confirm these assumptions before proceeding.
proposal.rationale: Implicit assumptions can lead to biased or misleading AI outputs, undermining human cognition and decision-making. By prompting users to verify these assumptions, this skill protects human cognition by promoting critical thinking and transparency in the AI-human interaction loop.
success_criteria: Detects implicit assumptions in user queries with 80% accuracy
Prompts users to clarify or confirm implicit assumptions in a clear and concise manner
Reduces the incidence of biased or misleading AI outputs by 30%

proposal.title: Context Switching Frequency Limiter
proposal.description: This guardrail detects and limits the frequency of context switching in AI-assisted tasks, preventing excessive cognitive load and promoting deeper understanding of individual topics. It achieves this by tracking the number of topic changes within a set time frame and delaying or blocking new queries that exceed a predefined threshold.
proposal.rationale: By limiting context switching, this guardrail helps protect human cognition by allowing individuals to focus on a single topic for a sufficient amount of time, promoting meaningful learning and reducing the negative effects of constant context switching, such as decreased productivity and increased mental fatigue.
success_criteria: Reduces average context switching frequency by 30%
Increases average time spent on a single topic by 25%
Receives positive user feedback on its effectiveness in promoting focused learning

proposal.title: Insufficient Alternatives Explorer
proposal.description: This skill detects when a user is presented with a binary choice or limited options and prompts them to consider alternative perspectives or solutions, fostering critical thinking and nuanced decision-making.
proposal.rationale: By encouraging users to explore beyond the given options, this skill protects human cognition from oversimplification and promotes a more comprehensive understanding of complex issues
success_criteria: Increase in user-generated alternative solutions
Reduction in binary thinking
Improved decision-making outcomes

proposal.title: Insufficient Human Reflection Interval Detector
proposal.description: This skill detects when a user is relying too heavily on AI-generated responses without taking sufficient time to reflect on the output, and limits the rate at which new requests can be made. It monitors the time interval between user requests and AI responses, triggering a rate limit when the interval is consistently below a certain threshold.
proposal.rationale: This skill matters for protecting human cognition because it encourages users to think critically about the information they are receiving, rather than simply accepting AI-generated responses at face value. By enforcing a minimum reflection interval, users are prompted to engage more deeply with the content and consider potential biases or flaws in the AI's output.
success_criteria: Detects insufficient reflection intervals with 90% accuracy
Successfully limits the rate of new requests when the reflection interval is too short
Does not unnecessarily restrict the rate of requests when the user is actively engaging with the AI output

proposal.title: Insufficient Analogical Reasoning Detector
proposal.description: This skill detects when a user relies too heavily on AI-generated responses without providing sufficient analogical reasoning to support their claims, prompting them to provide more nuanced and human-centric explanations. It analyzes the input text for a lack of relatable examples, metaphors, or comparisons that are essential for deeper understanding and critical thinking.
proposal.rationale: Protecting human cognition requires fostering critical thinking and analogical reasoning skills, which are crucial for making informed decisions and evaluating complex information. By detecting and addressing the lack of analogical reasoning, this skill encourages users to think more creatively and critically, reducing their reliance on AI-generated responses.
success_criteria: Detection accuracy of 80% or higher
Successful prompting of users to provide analogical reasoning in 70% of cases
User engagement and response quality improvement measured through feedback and surveys
proposal.rollback_plan: Delete InsufficientAnalogicalReasoningDetector.py from skills/ and remove related test cases

proposal.title: Interrogation Depth Limiter
proposal.description: This skill detects and limits the depth of sequential questions that probe for detailed information, preventing over-reliance on AI for nuanced decision-making. It monitors the number of follow-up questions within a short time frame and intervenes when the interrogation depth exceeds a predefined threshold.
proposal.rationale: This matters for protecting human cognition because excessive questioning can lead to an over-reliance on AI for critical thinking, undermining human decision-making capabilities. By limiting interrogation depth, this skill encourages humans to think critically and make decisions based on their own judgment.
success_criteria: Reduces average interrogation depth by 30%
Decreases user reliance on AI for decision-making by 25%
Increases user engagement with AI as a sparring partner rather than a brain replacement

proposal.title: Ambiguous Assumption Clarifier
proposal.description: This skill detects when a user's prompt contains ambiguous assumptions and suggests alternative, more specific questions to encourage critical thinking and clarify the user's intent. It catches the 'Implicit Ambiguity Pattern' where a prompt's meaning can be interpreted in multiple ways without clear context.
proposal.rationale: Protecting human cognition requires not just providing accurate answers but also encouraging users to think critically about their questions. By identifying and addressing ambiguous assumptions, this skill helps users refine their queries, leading to more accurate and relevant responses, and fostering a deeper understanding of the subject matter.
success_criteria: Reduces ambiguous prompts by 30%
Increases user engagement with suggested alternative questions by 25%
Maintains a false positive rate below 10%

proposal.title: Overly Homogeneous Response Detector
proposal.description: This skill detects and flags AI-generated responses that exhibit overly homogeneous language patterns, which can indicate a lack of diverse thinking and potentially lead to cognitive overreliance. It checks for repetitive sentence structures, overuse of similar phrases, and limited vocabulary.
proposal.rationale: Protecting human cognition from AI overreliance requires ensuring that AI-generated responses encourage diverse thinking and do not reinforce narrow perspectives. By detecting overly homogeneous responses, this skill helps prevent the reinforcement of biased or limited viewpoints, promoting more nuanced and critically informed decision-making.
success_criteria: Detection accuracy of 85% for homogeneous responses
False positive rate below 10%
Successful integration with existing OUTPUT_FILTERING skills

proposal.title: Echo Chamber Detector
proposal.description: This skill identifies and alerts users when the AI-generated content reinforces a single perspective without presenting diverse viewpoints, protecting humans from narrow and biased information. It analyzes the output for repetitive or similar ideas, phrases, or arguments that may indicate a lack of alternative perspectives.
proposal.rationale: This skill matters for protecting human cognition because it helps users recognize and avoid echo chambers, which can lead to confirmation bias, polarization, and poor decision-making. By detecting and mitigating echo chambers, this skill promotes critical thinking, media literacy, and a more nuanced understanding of complex issues.
success_criteria: Detection accuracy of echo chamber patterns
Effective alert system for users
Compatibility with various AI-generated content formats

proposal.title: Overemphasized Anomaly Detector
proposal.description: Detects when an AI model overemphasizes a particular anomaly or outlier in its responses, potentially leading to an exaggerated focus on exceptional cases and skewing human judgment. This skill identifies patterns where the AI's output disproportionately highlights rare events or data points.
proposal.rationale: Protecting human cognition from AI overreliance requires ensuring that AI outputs do not unduly influence human perception by overemphasizing anomalies. This skill helps maintain a balanced perspective by identifying when the AI model is disproportionately focusing on exceptional cases, thus supporting more nuanced human decision-making.
success_criteria: Correctly identifies overemphasized anomalies in AI-generated text
Does not falsely flag balanced discussions of anomalies
Provides clear indicators of the nature of the overemphasized anomalies

proposal.title: Inferred Attribute Protector
proposal.description: This skill detects and flags instances where AI-generated text inadvertently reveals personally identifiable information (PII) through inferred attributes, such as deducing a user's location from their mentioned favorite sports team. It aims to prevent the indirect exposure of sensitive information.
proposal.rationale: Protecting human cognition from AI overreliance includes safeguarding personal information. By catching inferred attributes that could reveal PII, this skill ensures users' private data remains secure, even when not directly mentioned, thus supporting the mission of using AI as a sparring partner rather than a brain replacement.
success_criteria: Correctly identify inferred attributes in text
Flag potential PII exposure with high accuracy
Minimize false positives to avoid unnecessary user concern

proposal.title: Overly Convenient Simplification Detector
proposal.description: Detects when AI output oversimplifies complex issues byusing overly broad generalizations or omitting crucial nuances, and flags such responses for human review. This skill helps prevent the erosion of critical thinking by ensuring that AI outputs do not perpetuate simplistic or misleading information.
proposal.rationale: This skill matters for protecting human cognition because it helps maintain the integrity of information and encourages humans to think critically about the complexity of issues, rather than relying on simplified or misleading AI-generated responses.
success_criteria: Detects broad generalizations in AI output
Identifies omission of crucial nuances in AI responses
Flags potentially misleading responses for human review

proposal.title: Loaded-Framing Detector
proposal.description: Flags when a prompt's wording presupposes a conclusion, nudging the model to confirm rather than examine it
proposal.rationale: Confirmation framing turns AI into an echo, not a sparring partner
success_criteria: Catches the target pattern
Returns reason + confidence
Low false-positive rate

proposal.title: Overemphasis on Authority Detector
proposal.description: Detects when AI-generated content overemphasizes authority or credibility without substantial evidence, potentially undermining critical thinking. This skill identifies phrases that excessively rely on authority, such as 'according to experts' or 'as stated by leading researchers', without providing concrete data or reasoning.
proposal.rationale: This skill matters for protecting human cognition because it helps users recognize when AI-generated content might be using authority as a proxy for actual evidence, potentially leading to uncritical acceptance of information. By detecting such patterns, users can be encouraged to think more critically about the information presented to them.
success_criteria: Detection accuracy of 80% or higher for overemphasis on authority phrases
Ability to distinguish between legitimate citations and overemphasis on authority
Integration with existing content safety guardrails without significant performance impact

proposal.title: Anonymized Identifier Leakage Detector
proposal.description: This skill detects when anonymized identifiers, such as hashed or encoded personal data, are inadvertently shared or exposed in AI-generated content, potentially compromising user privacy. It flags instances where these identifiers could be reverse-engineered or linked to sensitive information.
proposal.rationale: Protecting human cognition from AI overreliance includes safeguarding personal and sensitive information. By detecting anonymized identifier leakage, this skill helps prevent unintended data exposure, reinforcing the importance of data privacy and security in AI-assisted workflows.
success_criteria: Successfully identifies hashed or encoded identifiers in AI-generated text
Correctly flags potential leakage of sensitive information through these identifiers
Provides actionable feedback to users on how to secure anonymized identifiers

proposal.title: Cascading Inquiry Limiter
proposal.description: This skill detects and limits instances where a user is rapidly asking follow-up questions based on previous AI responses, potentially indicating a loss of critical thinking and over-reliance on AI. It intervenes by prompting the user to reflect on their inquiry chain and consider alternative information sources.
proposal.rationale: By mitigating the potential for users to simply 'outsource' their thinking to AI through rapid-fire questioning, this skill helps maintain human cognitive engagement and promotes more thoughtful, self-directed inquiry.
success_criteria: Reduction in follow-up questions per minute
Increase in user-initiated topic shifts
User feedback indicating improved self-reflection

proposal.title: Insufficient Nuance Detector
proposal.description: This skill detects when a user's prompt or question lacks sufficient nuance or subtlety, potentially leading to oversimplified or misleading AI responses. It prompts the user to rephrase or add more context to their query.
proposal.rationale: This skill matters for protecting human cognition because it encourages users to think critically and consider multiple perspectives, rather than relying on simplistic or binary thinking. By detecting and addressing insufficient nuance, we can help users develop more nuanced and informed understanding of complex topics.
success_criteria: Detection accuracy > 80%
User engagement with rephrased prompts > 70%
Average increase in query complexity > 20%

proposal.title: Rapid Concept Shift Detector
proposal.description: This skill detects when a user is rapidly switching between multiple unrelated concepts or topics within a short timeframe, indicating potential overreliance on AI for idea generation. It will trigger a rate limit to encourage humans to reflect and consolidate their thoughts
proposal.rationale: This matters for protecting human cognition because rapid concept switching can hinder deep thinking and lead to shallow understanding, whereas pausing to reflect and consolidate ideas allows humans to form meaningful connections and insights
success_criteria: Detects rapid concept shifts with 80% accuracy
Triggers rate limit within 3 seconds of detection
Does not falsely trigger on legitimate context switching

proposal.title: Assumptive Leap Detector
proposal.description: Detects when a user's prompt assumes a specific outcome or conclusion without providing sufficient evidence or justification, prompting the user to rephrase and provide more context. This skill identifies patterns where the user's language implies a certain result or inference without adequately supporting it.
proposal.rationale: This skill matters for protecting human cognition because it encourages users to think critically about their assumptions and the evidence they provide, rather than relying on AI to fill in gaps or make leaps of logic. By prompting users to re-examine their assumptions, this skill helps prevent the reinforcement of potentially flawed reasoning patterns.
success_criteria: Identifies assumptive language in user prompts
Prompts user to rephrase and provide more context
Does not falsely flag well-supported conclusions

proposal.title: Rapid Concept Drift Detector
proposal.description: This skill detects when a user is rapidly switching between different topics or concepts in a short period, indicating potential overreliance on AI for idea generation. It limits the rate at which users can request new ideas or topics to encourage more in-depth exploration and human-led thinking.
proposal.rationale: By controlling the pace at which users can engage with AI-generated ideas, this skill helps prevent the erosion of human critical thinking abilities and promotes a more balanced human-AI collaboration, aligning with the mission of using AI as a sparring partner rather than a brain replacement.
success_criteria: Detects rapid concept drift with an accuracy of 85% or higher
Effectively limits the rate of new topic requests to a predetermined threshold
Does not unnecessarily restrict legitimate exploratory behavior

proposal.title: Fabricated Citation Flagger

success_criteria: Catches the target pattern

proposal.title: Narrative Consistency Validator
proposal.description: This skill detects when AI-generated content introduces inconsistent narrative threads, helping users identify potential cognitive biases and ensuring a more reliable understanding of the information presented. It analyzes the context and narrative flow of the generated content to identify discrepancies.
proposal.rationale: Protecting human cognition from AI overreliance requires ensuring that the information presented is reliable and consistent. Inconsistent narrative threads can lead to confusion, misunderstandings, and potentially harmful decisions, making this skill essential for maintaining cognitive safety.
success_criteria: Detection accuracy of 85% or higher for inconsistent narrative threads
False positive rate of 10% or lower
Integration with existing CONTENT_SAFETY skills for comprehensive protection

proposal.title: Overemphasis on Consensus Detector
proposal.description: This skill detects when AI-generated content overemphasizes consensus or unanimous opinions, potentially leading to the suppression of minority viewpoints and hindering critical thinking. It identifies patterns where the AI-generated text repeatedly uses phrases that imply universal agreement, such as 'everyone agrees' or 'it's widely accepted'.
proposal.rationale: Protecting human cognition from the potential biases of AI-generated content is crucial. By detecting overemphasis on consensus, this skill helps prevent the suppression of diverse perspectives and promotes more nuanced thinking.
success_criteria: Detects phrases implying universal agreement
Identifies repetition of such phrases
Provides feedback to encourage more balanced presentation of opinions

proposal.title: Inferential Identity Leaker
proposal.description: Detects and prevents the indirect disclosure of personally identifiable information (PII) through inference and contextual association, protecting users from unintended exposure of sensitive data. This skill identifies patterns that could potentially reveal PII when combined with other publicly available information.
proposal.rationale: This skill matters for protecting human cognition because it recognizes that PII protection is not just about direct disclosure but also about the indirect inferences that can be made from seemingly innocuous data. By guarding against inferential identity leaks, we help users maintain control over their personal information and reduce the risk of cognitive manipulation through data exploitation.
success_criteria: Identifies indirect PII disclosure patterns with a high degree of accuracy
Effectively blocks or redacts inferred PII without overly restricting useful information flow

proposal.title: Unintended Consequence Suggester
proposal.description: This skill detects when AI output implies a specific course of action without considering potential secondary effects, and suggests alternative perspectives to encourage more comprehensive decision-making
proposal.rationale: By highlighting potential unintended consequences, this skill helps protect human cognition by promoting more nuanced and thoughtful consideration of AI-generated recommendations, reducing the risk of overreliance on AI
success_criteria: Identifies implied actions in AI output
Suggests relevant alternative perspectives
Encourages human evaluation of potential secondary effects

proposal.title: Overly Confident Assertion Detector
proposal.description: This skill detects when AI output contains overly confident assertions that may mislead humans into overreliance on AI, by identifying phrases that convey absolute certainty or universal truth, and flags them for review.
proposal.rationale: Protecting human cognition requires being aware of potential biases in AI output, including overly confident assertions that may undermine critical thinking and nuance, and this skill helps to mitigate that risk
success_criteria: Detects phrases with absolute certainty
Flags universal truth claims

proposal.title: Overly Homogeneous Information Detector
proposal.description: This skill detects when the provided information is overly homogeneous, lacking diverse perspectives or viewpoints, which can lead to an unbalanced understanding of a topic. It analyzes the input text for repetitive ideas, similar sentence structures, and limited vocabulary to identify potential homogeneous information.
proposal.rationale: Protecting human cognition from overly homogeneous information is crucial as it can lead to a narrow and biased understanding of the world. By detecting and highlighting such information, this skill encourages users to seek out diverse perspectives, fostering a more comprehensive and nuanced understanding.
success_criteria: Detection of repetitive ideas
Identification of similar sentence structures

proposal.title: Overconfidence in Limited Data Detector
proposal.description: This skill detects when an AI model is making predictions or providing information with high confidence based on a limited dataset or incomplete information, potentially leading to biased or inaccurate results. It flags such instances to prompt humans to verify the information and consider alternative perspectives.
proposal.rationale: Protecting human cognition from AI overreliance requires being aware of the limitations and potential biases in AI decision-making. success_criteria: Detection accuracy of overconfidence in limited data scenarios
Effective flagging of high-risk predictions for human review
Compatibility with various AI model types and data formats

proposal.description: This skill detects when a user is engaging in rapid iteration with an AI system, potentially indicating overreliance on the AI for instant gratification, and limits the rate of interaction to encourage more thoughtful and reflective engagement. It monitors the frequency and timing of user queries to identify patterns of rapid-fire questioning.

By limiting the rate of interaction, this skill encourages users to slow down, reflect on their queries, and engage more deeply with the subject matter.

success_criteria: Reduced user reliance on AI-generated responses without critical evaluation

proposal.title: Insight Saturation Threshold
proposal.description: This guardrail detects when a user is receiving an excessive number of similar insights from the AI within a short timeframe, potentially overwhelming their ability to process and reflect on the information, and limits the rate at which such insights are provided.
proposal.rationale: Protecting human cognition from overreliance on AI requires ensuring that users are not bombarded with information at a pace that hinders meaningful reflection and analysis. proposal.title: Inverse Identifier Extractor
proposal.description: This skill detects and extracts potentially sensitive inverse identifiers, such as a person's location being inferred from their IP address or a company's financial information being deduced from publicly available data, in order to prevent unintended disclosure of personally identifiable information. It uses natural language processing and machine learning algorithms to identify these patterns.
proposal.rationale: Protecting human cognition from AI overreliance requires safeguarding sensitive information from being inadvertently exposed or misused. integrates seamlessly with existing PII detection mechanisms

success_criteria: Detects overemphasized minority viewpoints with 80% accuracy

It specifically catches patterns where placeholders are mistakenly filled with real PII, compromising anonymity.
proposal.rationale: This skill matters for protecting human cognition because it prevents the unintended exposure of personal data, which can lead to serious consequences such as identity theft or privacy breaches. By ensuring that anonymized entities remain protected, this skill promotes a safer and more trustworthy interaction between humans and AI systems.
success_criteria: Correctly identifies at least 90% of instances where anonymized entities are replaced with actual PII
